rationale: The "POV: rushed home to play" hook is a generic lifestyle wrapper that shows zero of Hole.io's actual swallowing/growing loop, and the purple/gold palette plus explicit Tetris Block Party reference clash directly with the game's bright orange/blue cartoon cityscape DNA. Mechanic fit is weak because the archetype relies on substituting any title into the overlay rather than showcasing the satisfying consume-and-grow payoff that drives Hole.io installs. Only worth testing if reshot natively with Hole.io gameplay on-screen during the bed-dive — otherwise skip; the cluster is also a single-creative, single-advertiser signal with no proven scale.
